name: Quotable Water
description: Movie & TV quotes with a water twist
messages: You had me at hydration 💧
I'll have what she's having… water 🥤
Life is like a glass of water. Drink it. 🌊
May the hydration be with you 💫
I see dead cells. Drink water. 👁️
You can't handle the water! 💧
Water, obviously 🧐
I drink your milkshake! I drink it up! 🥤
My precious… water 💍
Houston, we have a dehydration problem 🚀
E.T. phone home. You drink water. 📞💧
I'm the king of the world! Of hydration 👑
Nobody puts water in a corner 💃
Go ahead, make my drink 💧
Here's looking at you, hydrated 🥂
I feel the need… the need for hydration ✈️
To infinity… and hydration! 🚀
Why so thirsty? 🃏
I am your father. Drink water. 🖤
Just keep drinking, just keep drinking 🐟
